view_definition:
SELECT membership_number,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    birthdate,
    street,
    zip,
    city,
    fishing_card_type,
    is_local,
    created_at
   FROM members m
  WHERE (status = 'active'::text);

SELECT id AS user_id,
    club_id,
    'active'::text AS status,
    COALESCE(last_seen_at, last_sign_in_at, last_login_at, first_login_at, created_at, now()) AS updated_at
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE (club_id IS NOT NULL);

SELECT id AS user_id,
    member_no,
    display_name,
    first_login_at,
    last_seen_at,
    ((last_seen_at IS NOT NULL) AND (last_seen_at >= (now() - '00:05:00'::interval))) AS is_online
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE is_admin_or_vorstand();

SELECT 'meeting_task'::text AS responsibility_type,
    mt.id AS source_id,
    mt.title,
    (mt.status)::text AS status,
    mt.due_date,
    mt.status_note,
    NULL::timestamp with time zone AS starts_at,
    NULL::timestamp with time zone AS ends_at,
    NULL::text AS location,
    mt.created_at,
    mt.updated_at
   FROM (meeting_tasks mt
     JOIN task_assignees ta ON (((ta.task_id = mt.id) AND (ta.user_id = auth.uid()))))
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'work_event_lead'::text AS responsibility_type,
    we.id AS source_id,
    we.title,
    (we.status)::text AS status,
    ((we.starts_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin'::text))::date AS due_date,
    NULL::text AS status_note,
    we.starts_at,
    we.ends_at,
    we.location,
    we.created_at,
    we.updated_at
   FROM (work_events we
     JOIN work_event_leads wl ON (((wl.work_event_id = we.id) AND (wl.user_id = auth.uid()))));
